---
name: 💡 Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[feature] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

<!--
Thank you for taking the time to suggest an improvement!

A great feature request includes a clear PROBLEM, a USE CASE, and a
PROPOSED SOLUTION. The more concrete you are, the more likely the
maintainers can scope it correctly.

Please check open issues first to avoid duplicates.
-->

## Problem

<!-- One paragraph describing the problem you're trying to solve. Avoid jargon if possible. -->

## Who benefits

<!-- Mark with [x]. Multiple is fine. -->

- [ ] Students learning chemistry
- [ ] Teachers / professors
- [ ] Researchers
- [ ] Developers integrating BIME
- [ ] Pharma / industry users
- [ ] Other: <!-- describe -->

## Use case

<!--
Walk us through a concrete scenario. "When I'm doing X, I want to do Y,
but currently I have to do Z which is awkward because…"
-->

## Proposed solution

<!--
Describe what you'd like to see. Sketches, UI mockups, API shape, or
behaviour descriptions are all welcome.
-->

## Alternatives considered

<!--
What would happen if BIME did nothing? Are there other tools that already
solve this? Why are they not enough?
-->

## Out of scope

<!-- What is this feature explicitly NOT asking for? -->

## Priority

<!-- Mark with [x]. -->

- [ ] Blocking my work — I cannot use BIME without this
- [ ] Important — it would significantly improve my workflow
- [ ] Nice-to-have — minor UX win
